description: PR2 scenario #6 — parity / obviously feasible rooming. A small section with a generous lecture room in the right gender at an uncontested slot. Every oracle helper must return None. After PR2 code lands, unplaced_count == 0 and room_failures == []. Parity against PR1's feasible-rooming baseline (no decision drift when the oracle does its job).
notes: Per DoR sign-off answer A: parity is test #6 and a first-class member of the scenario pack, NOT an afterthought. If the oracle ever fires on an obviously feasible case, it's an oracle bug.

Pairs with the PR1 parity contract (pr1_parity_baseline.json): PR1 asserted prayer/lock flags-off reproduces the baseline; PR2 asserts oracle flag-on still reproduces it when the scenario is feasible.
